narrative:
Joseph Badger Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 4,180 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
